details.context: Added networks/devices/ports fallback flow v3->v2->v1 with payload retries, detailed success/failure logs, and merge of port IDs/names back into device records for interface UI labels.
details.change_scope: Added _normalize_mac, _extract_device_port_rows, get_device_port_details, _enrich_devices_with_port_details and integrated enrichment into get_site_devices responses.

details.context: Adjusted interface extraction to prefer stable portId and natural name label from port rows so UI headers use human-readable interface names.
details.change_scope: Changed interface ID precedence to portId->interfaceId->id and added port_id metadata key on interface records.

details.context: Stopped collapsing merged interface catalogs to id/name only so display metadata survives merge and can be used by interface_display_name.
